name: customer-manager-3
title: customer-manager-3

main_section:
<style>

.health-check { font-family: Arial; direction: rtl; padding: 20px; }

.health-check h2 { color: #2c3e50; text-align: center; margin-bottom: 20px; }

.health-check table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; margin: 15px 0; font-size: 13px; }

.health-check th { background: #2c3e50; color: white; padding: 10px; }

.health-check td { padding: 8px 10px; border: 1px solid #ddd; text-align: center; }

.health-check tr:nth-child(even) { background: #f9f9f9; }

.stat-box { display: inline-block; margin: 10px; padding: 15px 25px; border-radius: 8px; text-align: center; min-width: 150px; }

.stat-ok { background: #4CAF50; color: white; }

.stat-bad { background: #FF5252; color: white; }

.stat-warn { background: #FFC107; color: #333; }

.stats-row { text-align: center; margin: 20px 0; }

.stat-number { font-size: 28px; font-weight: bold; }

.stat-label { font-size: 13px; margin-top: 5px; }

.section-title { background: #f39c12; color: white; padding: 8px 15px; border-radius: 5px; margin: 20px 0 10px; }

.loading { text-align: center; padding: 50px; font-size: 18px; color: #888; }

#year-filter { padding: 8px 15px; font-size: 14px; border-radius: 5px; border: 1px solid #ddd; margin-bottom: 15px; }

</style>


<div class="health-check" id="health-container">

 <h2>🏥 فحص صحة فواتير المبيعات</h2>

 <div style="text-align:center">

   <select id="year-filter" onchange="loadHealthCheck()">

     <option value="2026" selected>2026</option>

     <option value="2025">2025</option>

   </select>

 </div>

 <div class="loading" id="loading">جاري التحميل...</div>

 <div id="results" style="display:none"></div>

</div>


<script>

function loadHealthCheck() {

 var year = document.getElementById('year-filter').value;

 document.getElementById('loading').style.display = 'block';

 document.getElementById('results').style.display = 'none';


 frappe.call({

   method: 'frappe.client.get_list',

   args: {

     doctype: 'Sales Invoice',

     filters: [['docstatus','=',1],['posting_date','>=',year+'-01-01'],['posting_date','<=',year+'-12-31']],

     fields: ['count(name) as total'],

     limit_page_length: 0

   },

   async: true,

   callback: function(r) {

     var total_inv = r.message[0].total;

     loadDetails(year, total_inv);

   }

 });

}


function loadDetails(year, total_inv) {

 frappe.call({

   method: 'frappe.client.get_list',

   type: 'GET',

   args: {

     doctype: 'Sales Invoice',

     filters: [['docstatus','=',1],['posting_date','>=',year+'-01-01'],['posting_date','<=',year+'-12-31']],

     fields: ['name'],

     limit_page_length: 0

   },

   async: true,

   callback: function() {

     // Get invoices without sales team

     frappe.call({

       method: 'frappe.client.get_list',

       args: {

         doctype: 'Sales Invoice',

         filters: [['docstatus','=',1],['posting_date','>=',year+'-01-01'],['posting_date','<=',year+'-12-31']],

         fields: ['name','owner','posting_date','customer'],

         limit_page_length: 0

       },

       callback: function(all) {

         var all_invoices = all.message;

         // Now get which ones have sales team

         frappe.call({

           method: 'frappe.client.get_list',

           args: {

             doctype: 'Sales Team',

             filters: [['parenttype','=','Sales Invoice']],

             fields: ['distinct parent as name'],

             limit_page_length: 0

           },

           callback: function(st) {

             var with_team = {};

             (st.message || []).forEach(function(r) { with_team[r.name] = true; });


             var no_team = all_invoices.filter(function(inv) { return !with_team[inv.name]; });

             var ok_count = all_invoices.length - no_team.length;


             var html = '<div class="stats-row">';

             html += '<div class="stat-box ' + (no_team.length === 0 ? 'stat-ok' : 'stat-bad') + '">';

             html += '<div class="stat-number">' + no_team.length + '</div>';

             html += '<div class="stat-label">فواتير بدون فريق مبيعات</div></div>';

             html += '<div class="stat-box stat-ok">';

             html += '<div class="stat-number">' + ok_count + '</div>';

             html += '<div class="stat-label">فواتير سليمة</div></div>';

             html += '<div class="stat-box stat-warn">';

             html += '<div class="stat-number">' + all_invoices.length + '</div>';

             html += '<div class="stat-label">إجمالي الفواتير</div></div>';

             html += '</div>';


             if (no_team.length > 0) {

               html += '<div class="section-title">❌ فواتير بدون فريق مبيعات (' + no_team.length + ')</div>';

               html += '<table><tr><th>#</th><th>الفاتورة</th><th>المالك</th><th>التاريخ</th><th>العميل</th></tr>';

               no_team.forEach(function(r, i) {

                 html += '<tr><td>' + (i+1) + '</td>';

                 html += '<td><a href="/app/sales-invoice/' + r.name + '">' + r.name + '</a></td>';

                 html += '<td>' + r.owner + '</td>';

                 html += '<td>' + r.posting_date + '</td>';

                 html += '<td>' + (r.customer || '') + '</td></tr>';

               });

               html += '</table>';

             } else {

               html += '<div style="text-align:center;padding:30px;color:#4CAF50;font-size:20px">✅ جميع الفواتير سليمة — لا توجد مشاكل</div>';

             }


             document.getElementById('loading').style.display = 'none';

             document.getElementById('results').style.display = 'block';

             document.getElementById('results').innerHTML = html;

           }

         });

       }

     });

   }

 });

}


loadHealthCheck();

</script>
